codeReview.summary: Reviewed EventLogPanel runtime-mode changes, stylesheet updates, and the new filter/scroll test suite in commit a9b4933. Implementation matches the feature contract: badge subset filtering with Select all/Clear all, filter persistence across ingestion and remount, scroll-anchor preservation while prepending, off-top Jump to newest affordance, no-empty flicker regression coverage, and 200-entry newest-first/no-duplicate assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is a policy mismatch between required UI verification procedures and accepted feature verification: this feature added user-visible behavior but was validated with Vitest-only and marked as a skill deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with deviation 'ui-screen-worker step 7 — Manual verification via agent-browser' and verification.commandsRun limited to tsc/vitest. .factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md states agent-browser is required for new/changed user-visible elements, while mission AGENTS.md Testing & Validation Guidance says agent-browser is mandatory for UI validation.

summary: Pass. The feature implementation in a9b4933 satisfies the stated behavior and expected checks with strong focused tests; no actionable code defects were found in scope. One shared-state process mismatch (agent-browser requirement vs accepted Vitest-only verification) was observed.
